title: cli pipeline command with valid config
description: Test the CLI pipeline command with a valid configuration file. Verify that the pipeline starts, calls the build_pipeline_graph function, executes the LangGraph graph successfully, and completes with exit code 0.

title: cli pipeline command with invalid config
description: Test the CLI pipeline command with an invalid configuration file. Verify that the CLI returns a non-zero exit code with an 'invalid config' error message and does not call the build_pipeline_graph function.

title: datamanager load existing artifact
description: Test DataManager's ability to load an existing artifact file. Verify that the artifact is loaded and parsed correctly with schema-v0 validation.

title: datamanager load missing artifact
description: Test DataManager's behavior when attempting to load a non-existent artifact. Verify that it raises a FileNotFoundError or returns an 'artifact not found' error, and the caller handles the missing artifact appropriately.

title: scraper stepstone provider success
description: Test the scraper CLI for the stepstone provider with a valid job ID. Verify that the scraper returns HTTP 200, writes the JobPosting JSON artifact to the specified output path, and that DataManager can load the artifact.

title: scraper stepstone provider bot protection fallback
description: Test the scraper CLI for the stepstone provider when bot protection triggers (e.g., HTTP 429). Verify that the fallback LLM extraction method is invoked, returns a valid JobPosting JSON, and the artifact is saved by DataManager.

title: match_skill subgraph execution and artifact persistence
description: Test the execution of the match_skill LangGraph subgraph. Verify that the subgraph runs to completion, produces a MatchArtifact, and persists it to the expected path.

title: match_skill hitl review approve command
description: Test the HITL review approve command in the Textual TUI. Verify that the MatchBus sends the approve decision to LangGraph, which processes it and transitions the subgraph to the generate_documents node.

title: generate_documents chain success
description: Test the document generation chain with sufficient context. Verify that the chain returns a GeneratedDocuments artifact, which is saved to the expected path and can be loaded by DataManager.

title: render coordinator successful rendering
description: Test the RenderCoordinator's ability to render a document (e.g., CV) using the tex engine and default template. Verify that it returns binary PDF bytes, writes the output file via WorkspaceManager, and the CLI package command completes successfully.
